**Summary**
  _Brief description of the work to be done._

**Context**
  _Why this task is needed. Link to related issue, decision, or discussion if applicable._

  - [ ] ...
  - [ ] ...

**Technical Notes**
  _Implementation hints, constraints, affected files/services — only if non-obvious._

**Definition of Done**
  - [ ] Code reviewed and merged
  - [ ] `yarn typecheck` passes
  - [ ] `yarn lint` passes
  - [ ] Tests added/updated if relevant
